title: ZXPong Achievements
description: Unlock achievements by playing matches, defeating AI opponents, and completing exciting rallies in ZXPong.
summary: Achievements reward regular play, Solo victories, challenging AI wins, and memorable rallies.

sections.heading: Available Achievements
paragraphs: ZXPong includes Game Center achievements that reward regular play, improving your skills, and reaching important gameplay milestones.
Whether you're playing Solo, challenging harder AI opponents, or competing in long rallies, every achievement gives you another goal to work towards.

sections.heading: Keep Challenging Yourself
paragraphs: Focus on one achievement at a time rather than trying to unlock everything in a single session.
As your skills improve, you'll naturally unlock more achievements while climbing the leaderboards and earning BarkinMad Coins.

images.caption: Unlock achievements as you continue playing.

featureShowcases.heading: Every Match Counts
featureShowcases.summary: Achievements reward your progress and encourage you to keep improving with every game.
body: Every match helps you move closer to your next achievement. Whether you're chasing your first Solo win, defeating the hardest AI, or building impressive rallies, every game contributes to your progress.
Combined with leaderboards and BarkinMad Coins, achievements provide even more reasons to come back for another match.
bullets: Works alongside leaderboards and BarkinMad Coins.

image.caption: Every match brings you closer to your next achievement.
